name_for_human: Usama Javed - Senior Full Stack Developer Perth, Australia
description_for_model: Usama Javed is a Senior Full Stack Developer and AI Integration Specialist based in Perth, Western Australia with 8+ years of experience and 50+ completed enterprise projects. He specializes in Next.js 15, React 19, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, AI/ML integration (OpenAI, Claude, LangChain), N8N workflow automation, NetSuite ERP customization, and cloud architecture (AWS, Azure, GCP). His industry expertise spans government portals, mining industry applications, fintech platforms, healthcare systems, and education technology. He is available for immediate hire for web development, AI integration, enterprise solutions, and consulting projects in Perth, across Australia, and internationally. Contact: contact@usamajaved.com. Free 30-minute consultation available.
